title: agerella arvensis
intro: Agerella arvensis, also known as wild chamomile or field chamomile, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Agerella arvensis include reducing anxiety and insomnia, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Agerella arvensis include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
